// src/pages/learner/CompletionPage.jsx import { useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; export default function CompletionPage() { const location = useLocation(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const state = location.state || {}; const studentName = localStorage.getItem("student_name") || "Student"; const overallPct = state.overallPct ? Math.round(state.overallPct) : 100; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB", { day: "numeric", month: "long", year: "numeric", }); function handlePrint() { window.print(); } return (

marginBottom: "16px" }, title: { fontSize: "2rem", fontWeight: 700, color: "#1D1C1A", letterSpacing: "-0.5px", marginBottom: "8px", }, subtitle: { fontSize: "1rem", color: "#888780", lineHeight: 1.6 }, statsRow: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3,1fr)", gap: "16px", marginBottom: "32px", }, statCard: { background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #EEECE6", borderRadius: "14px", padding: "24px", textAlign: "center", }, statValue: { fontSize: "2rem", fontWeight: 700, color: "#1D9E75", marginBottom: "6px", }, statLabel: { fontSize: "0.78rem", color: "#888780" }, certificate: { background: "#fff", border: "2px solid #1D9E75", borderRadius: "16px", padding: "36px 40px", marginBottom: "28px", textAlign: "center", }, certHeader: { marginBottom: "20px" }, certLogo: { fontSize: "1.1rem", fontWeight: 700, color: "#1D9E75" }, certTagline: { fontSize: "0.78rem", color: "#888780", marginTop: "4px" }, certHeading: { fontSize: "1.4rem", fontWeight: 700, color: "#1D1C1A", marginBottom: "12px", letterSpacing: "-0.3px", }, certBody: { fontSize: "0.88rem", color: "#888780", lineHeight: 1.6, marginBottom: "8px", }, certName: { fontSize: "1.6rem", fontWeight: 700, color: "#085041", marginBottom: "12px", letterSpacing: "-0.3px", }, certMeta: { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", marginTop: "24px", fontSize: "0.78rem", color: "#888780", borderTop: "1px solid #EEECE6", paddingTop: "16px", }, certGuide: { fontSize: "0.75rem", color: "#B4B2A9", marginTop: "8px" }, actions: { display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "10px" }, primaryBtn: { width: "100%", padding: "14px", borderRadius: "10px", background: "#1D9E75", color: "#fff", fontSize: "0.95rem", fontWeight: 600, border: "none", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "'Sora', sans-serif", }, secondaryBtn: { width: "100%", padding: "13px", borderRadius: "10px", background: "#fff", color: "#888780", fontSize: "0.9rem", fontWeight: 500, border: "1px solid #EEECE6", cursor: "pointer",
